title: [BUG] Parse big csv file/stream slowly.
author: leoxiaoping

comments.author: RedEyePilot
comments.body:
What worked for me for a 16MB CSV file was adding '`options?: {map: (() => {})}`' like below. I used readFile however, but read(stream) also have the same argument, so see if that helps. This trick reduced my read time from 5 minutes to 2 seconds. Please let me know of your results.
`workbook.csv.readFile(filePath_med, {map:(val => val)});`
